footer.shortcutHint: Press Ctrl+S to save and Esc to close

generateTasksModal.title: Generate Tasks from PRD
generateTasksModal.askClaudeDesc: Save this PRD, then ask Claude Code in chat to parse the file and create your initial tasks.
generateTasksModal.examplePromptText: I have a PRD at .taskmaster/docs/{{fileName}}. Parse it and create the initial tasks.

overwriteModal.title: File Already Exists
overwriteModal.description: A PRD named "{{fileName}}" already exists. Do you want to overwrite it?

alerts.emptyContent: Please add content to the PRD before generating tasks.
